files.content:
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=61.0.0", "wheel"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[project]
name = "agente-independente"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Agente independente para análise e correção de projetos Python"
readme = "README.md"
requires-python = ">=3.8"
dependencies = [
  "click>=8.1.0",
]

[project.scripts]
agente = "src.main:cli"

# Agente Independente

Agente autônomo para análise e correção de projetos Python baseada em regras.

## Instalação

pip install -r requirements.txt
pip install -e .

## Uso

agente analyze /caminho/para/projeto
agente fix /caminho/para/projeto

## Testes

pytest

from .agent import FixerAgent
from .core import PythonFixer

import shutil
from pathlib import Path

def create_backup(file_path: Path):
    if file_path.exists():
        backup_path = file_path.with_suffix(file_path.suffix + '.bak')
        shutil.copy2(file_path, backup_path)
        print(f"Backup criado: {backup_path}")

import pytest
import sys
from pathlib import Path

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).parent.parent / 'src'))

from analyser.project_analyzer import ProjectAnalyzer, Issue

@pytest.fixture
def sample_project(tmp_path):
    (tmp_path / 'test.py').write_text("print('hello')\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    pass\n")
    return tmp_path

def test_missing_src(tmp_path):
    analyzer = ProjectAnalyzer(tmp_path)
    issues = analyzer.analyze()
    assert any(i.type == 'structure' and 'src/' in i.message for i in issues)

def test_print_detection(sample_project):
    analyzer = ProjectAnalyzer(sample_project)
    issues = analyzer.analyze()
    assert any('print()' in i.message for i in issues)

import pytest
import sys
from pathlib import Path

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).parent.parent / 'src'))

from analyser.project_analyzer import ProjectAnalyzer
from fixer.agent import FixerAgent

@pytest.fixture
def project_with_print(tmp_path):
    pyfile = tmp_path / 'debug.py'
    pyfile.write_text("print('debug message')\n")
    return tmp_path

def test_fix_print(project_with_print):
    agent = FixerAgent(project_with_print)
    agent.fix()
    content = (project_with_print / 'debug.py').read_text()
    assert '# print' in content

# Teste do Agente Independente - CORRIGIDO

$projDir = '0'
Set-Location $projDir

Write-Host "Verificando estrutura do projeto..." -ForegroundColor Green

$checks = @(
    @{Path='pyproject.toml'; Name='pyproject.toml'},
    @{Path='src'; Name='src/'},
    @{Path='src/analyser'; Name='src/analyser/'},
    @{Path='src/fixer'; Name='src/fixer/'},
    @{Path='src/utils'; Name='src/utils/'},
    @{Path='tests'; Name='tests/'}
)

foreach ($check in $checks) {
    if (Test-Path $check.Path) {
        Write-Host "OK: $($check.Name)" -ForegroundColor Green
    } else {
        Write-Warning "Falta: $($check.Name)"
    }
}

Write-Host "Instalando dependências..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
pip install -r requirements.txt

Write-Host "Testando CLI..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
python -m src.main --help

Write-Host "Análise de exemplo..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
python -m src.main analyze .

Write-Host "Executando testes..." -ForegroundColor Yellow
pip install pytest
pytest -v

Write-Host "Teste concluído!" -ForegroundColor Green
